textPlain: Using poor, hungry people as pawns in their political games is evil. Full stop.
Citizens offering kindness to people in need will not be tolerated.Christian America's support of these guys has to be a pretty big disappointment to their god...
Democrats also shut down the government. So they are also using the poor hungry people as pawns in their political games. Elephant hippo.
